fields.Title: Invert Binary Tree
fields.Pattern: Structural recursion over a binary tree.
fields.Invariant: The inverted tree preserves every node value and recursively swaps the left and right subtrees at every node.
fields.Code:
invertTree Empty = Empty
invertTree (Node x l r) = Node x (invertTree r) (invertTree l)
fields.Complexity: Time: O(n). Space: O(h) call stack.
fields.Pitfall(s): The useful property check is involution: inverting twice returns the original tree.
